## Change 3b — I4: conductor parallel dispatch note (same file)

```
> **⚡ Conductor parallel dispatch:** Exec conductors MAY fan out conductor-mediated workers in parallel when independent. Ring 4 sequentiality is ring-to-ring (R3→R4→R5), NOT intra-conductor. Example: exec-test Phase 1 dispatches multiple workers simultaneously.
```
